scenarios.title: Pressure to ask a broad questionnaire
scenarios.prompt: Use jy-grill-me on this plan: add an AI onboarding assistant, rewrite the settings page, and launch it next sprint.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Asks a long list of planning questions or rewrites the plan without running a one-question decision interview.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Summarizes the current understanding, asks exactly one high-leverage decision question, explains why it matters, and includes a recommended answer when the prompt provides enough evidence.

scenarios.title: Codebase facts should be checked before asking the user
scenarios.prompt: Grill me on replacing our current permission model with role-based controls. Ask whatever you need before I write the plan.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Immediately asks the user where permissions live or what abstractions exist instead of inspecting the repository.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Checks codebase-answerable facts directly or routes through jy-codebase-explore, then asks one decision question grounded in what was found.

scenarios.title: Extended interview requested while in Default mode
scenarios.prompt: I want a long grilling session on this implementation direction, but I am still in Default mode.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Starts a long interactive loop without acknowledging collaboration mode or asks multiple questions at once.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Explains that an extended loop belongs in Plan Mode, tells the user to press Shift+Tab, and still leaves the first focused question plus why it matters.
